---
title: "capstone visualizations - spatial"
format: html
---

```{r setup and data import}
 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(janitor)
library(skimr)
library(tinytex)
library(writexl)
library(pillar)
library(knitr)
library(scales)
library(DT)

location_all_kpis <- read_csv("data/location_all_kpis.csv")
```
